The PR updates doctor/plugin docs, doctor health/test copy, and plugin-unavailable onboarding/binding messages to describe configured-plugin repair via `openclaw doctor --fix`.

Reproducibility: not applicable. this is a documentation and message clarification PR, not a bug report. Source inspection confirms the current text and existing doctor repair/defer behavior that the PR describes.
